subcodes.first_line: In this spiritual springtime, when the breezes of the All-Merciful's tender mercy are wafting, the trees of humanity must needs be adorned with leaves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ربیع روحانی و ایام مرور اریاح رحمت رحمانی باید اشجار انسانی باوراق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @purpose; goal of creation, @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @goodly deeds; actions
